reviews.title: sad hotel stay, it was not a good night
reviews.positives: nothing is there to like, other than there is a bed to sleep!
reviews.negatives:
This hotel has deteriorated significantly and is heavily occupied by nightclub visitors during the evenings, making it an unsuitable choice for families. The overall atmosphere and crowd entering the hotel are not of a desirable standard.
There are many better hotel options nearby in Al Seef or Mankhool that would be worth considering instead.
The hotel appears to be managed by a single owner who is unwilling to accommodate any booking amendments and offers no flexibility. The staff are rude, and the management seems unconcerned about how the hotel operates or how guests are treated.
It seems the hotel’s main focus is the nightclub businesses operating on the ground floor, which dominate the property.
If you consider yourself part of a middle-class or upper-middle-class clientele, I would strongly recommend avoiding this hotel. The current management standards are very poor.

reviews.title: Terrible experience
reviews.text: This hotel was one of the worst experiences I’ve ever had. The room was extremely dirty, with dust everywhere, and absolutely no proper cleanliness maintained. The furniture was almost broken and looked like it hadn’t been maintained in years.The service was terrible — the reception staff were unbelievably lazy and unhelpful. Even for basic complimentary tissues, we had to request multiple times before getting anything. On top of that, it took almost an hour just to get cold water.The hotel doesn’t even provide a smart TV, which was very disappointing considering the price and expectations. Overall, horrible service, poor maintenance, and a complete waste of money. I would never recommend this hotel to anyone.

reviews.title: Miserable
reviews.positives: All good to the most part
reviews.negatives: No hot water, shower was cold water only, no shampoos, a/c switches broken room was freezing cold, phones were broken cud not even contact hotel staff none of the departments were reachable unless I walk down to the lobby was fucking annoying and nobody responded nor fixed the complaints and I checked out passed off taking cold water shower now I'm sick

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Horrible service.

I booked this hotel for March 2026 and unfortunately had to cancel my travel plans because my flight was cancelled due to the Iran war situation. Despite informing the hotel and sending multiple emails with supporting documents, I have still not received any response from the manager or the hotel team.
The lack of communication and complete disregard for customer concerns is extremely disappointing. During an emergency situation, I expected at least some understanding or professional courtesy, but instead I experienced extremely poor customer service. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone because of their unresponsive management and refusal to assist customers in difficult circumstances.

reviews.title: Worst experience ever.  Very very unprofessional behavior and totally unexpected from them.
reviews.negatives:
Worst experience ever. Very very rude behavior of Mr. Tamer Mahmoud. That is not how a hospitality guy talk to customers.
We booked 3 rooms for 2 nights.
1 room they gave early check in by JUST ONE HOUR AT 11AM,since we reached Dubai early. For that they have charged 85AED.
Second room we got at 4 PM and third room we got post 6PM. This was also after multiple request from check in counter.
Now after we check out they ask us for additional money because they gave us one room early by whole 1 hour. Very very unprofessional behavior and totally unexpected from them.
We booked through reference if Booking.com. We need our money back.  Please refund the stay.This is not what we had signed up for.
We are an avid user of Booking .com and we don’t want such hotels in your platform.

reviews.title: Poor quality for money
reviews.text:
Rooms are old and dirty with dim lighting giving the room a depressing feel.
Breakfast was chaotic and poorly organised with lack of plates and cutlery. Not enough space to accommodate all the guests. The quality of food was also very poor.
The management didn't try to help with the service and they seem understaffed and they have taken on too many guests. For the money I paid I expected better rooms and food quality.
Won't be staying here again.
Also the location is too far from downtown which makes it difficult to commute.

reviews.title: Substandard rooms and unpleasant experience & stay
reviews.positives: Courteous staff , no one misbehaved or was disrespectful .
reviews.negatives:
Substandard room , lifts are horrible , 
Room landline didn’t work , food was bad- ( extremely salty chicken fried rice provided in 1st instance , on complaining changed just the rice with absolutely no salt in it and leaving the salty chicken pieces from the earlier order as it is ), room service was horrible . ( asked for milk packets twice to prepare coffee and it never arrived until checkout . ) Rooms are old and not painted , mattresses are substandard too . Valet parking - takes 15 mins for car to arrive and returns the car dusty - wonder where they park the car . Overall was not a pleasant experience .

reviews.title: Worest experience for hotels ever
reviews.text:
We have very bad experience with this hotel ( Arabian  Court  Yard -Dubai)
We made reservation for (4) rooms  and requested additional bed through Agooda .. We were (10) with a child .. when we arrived hotel on 26/ Dec/ 2018. We  met a very bad employee on the reception ( Thamir Mahmoud) .. He came to us telling us there is no additional available bed ..and no solution  except to accommodate (8) of us and through one adult and the child to the street.. He looked to us  as cheaters.. He and his colleague informed us that all rooms are booked even we found availability of rooms on booking on the same time.. It  was very bad time that we spent with him.. Finally we accidentally found (2) beds laid on  the corridor of the same floor of  our rooms.. I took one of them  to one of our rooms. When we referred  to him he pretended that those beds are reserved for customer next day and finally agreed to keep it for us.This type of  behavior from this guy (Thamir Mahmoud/Egyptian) caused hate to

reviews.title: Decent, but, could have been much better.
reviews.positives: Location is probably the only good thing about this Hotel
reviews.negatives:
Housekeeping Services were terrible.
The team at the reception were well informed in advace to not charge my card and they were free to block any amount. They kept insisting I pay the full amount for 3 nights stay upfront. I told them they were free to block the required amount on my credit card, and I would pay at checkout, but the team kept forcing me to pay the full amount upfront.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Property was very.
reviews.negatives: Most of the staff were polite, but the some came across as quite rude. We were travelling with our 2-year-old toddler and requested some milk, which they refused and asked us to arrange ourselves. Also, although breakfast was supposed to be available until 10:30 am, they would start closing the buffet by 10:28 without any prior notice.

reviews.title: terrible
reviews.text:
It is saddening that the places we expect good hospitality and kindness are expected with such rudeness,and people are treated differently based on where they come from.The rudeness was subtle and not to my face,but to my friend it was not subtle at all.When my friend asked their preferrance to keep the electric scooter,the staff responded with 'this is a prestigious hotel with a lot of high-valued guests' coming in,and an 'electric scooter' would defame their reputation. Later on they asked to go down to parking where someone will help keep it somewhere.No one came for a while and  the employee their seemed surprised with this process,and atleast he was kind enough to give us permission to keep it in our room.
Next is the lack of employee coordination and communication.From the morning I have confirmed the pool timing with them which was until 7pm,but when I went there it was closed.When asked about it their response was"I just though you wanted to know about the time but didnt think you wanted to use the pool!!" Why and how does someone dont have the common sense to understand this.
Lastly just note -when the say complimnentary spa --they mean 20% off on al services of spa,and not complimentary.
I also want to mention that if the staff has something rude or any remarks to say,say it to our face and not in a way we can hear you but cant tell to our face.

Later on they asked to go down to parking where someone will help keep it somewhere.No one came for a while and  the employee their seemed surprised with this process,and atleast he was kind enough to give us permission to keep it in our room.

We value your concern in taking the time to share your disappointments, please accept our sincerest apology for the inconveniences caused.

Your remarks on various areas have been addressed to the concerned department to take corrective measures and appropriate action. Once again, we apologize that there were lapses on our part and we failed to meet up to your expectations.

Thank you and we hope that the above experience will not hinder you from considering the hotel as an option to stay during your next visit.

reviews.negatives:
Booked a taxi & paid the night before to take us to the airport which didn't turn up..
I was told it was stuck in traffic this was before 7 in the morning after 30 minutes of complaining & being told don't worry if you miss your flight we will compensate you,when I had family in Mauritius waiting for us . Eventually  they rang for a manager to come in.& get us 2 taxis off the street,the meters clocked up less than half what we had paid 
I don't even think they had booked the taxi,it was very distressing as we had our elderly mother in law with us

reviews.title: Very Disappointing Stay – Not Recommended at All
reviews.text:
I had a very bad experience at this hotel. The room I booked was completely different from what I received. The staff did not understand my requests, and instead of helping, they even threatened to charge a penalty. The room conditions were extremely poor — you cannot charge your phone, you cannot smoke cigarettes, you cannot use the TV, and the lighting is terrible. Only a dim yellow light is provided, which doesn’t brighten the room properly.

There is no way to contact anyone from the room because no phone or support number is provided. If you need anything, there is absolutely no help available. On top of that, they also charged AED 30 per day as city tax without proper explanation.

Overall, this was a very disappointing and frustrating experience. I will never recommend this hotel to anyone, and I myself will never make this mistake again.

reviews.response:
ear Guest,

Thank you for your feedback.

We’re sorry to hear about your experience after checkout. Providing a welcoming and considerate environment for our guests at all times — including after checkout — is very important to us. Your comment has been shared with the concerned team to ensure this does not happen again.

We truly value your visit and hope to have the opportunity to serve you better in the future.

Warm regards,
The Hotel Management

reviews.title: Ac and mini bar refrigirator not working properly
reviews.text: Ac and mini bar refrigerator not work properly i have complain many times but no solution properly.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at our hotel. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the AC and minibar refrigerator, as well as the lack of prompt resolution to your concerns.

Please know that providing a comfortable and enjoyable stay for our guests is our top priority, and it is clear we fell short during your visit. We regret that your complaints were not addressed adequately, and we understand how frustrating this must have been for you.

We have taken immediate steps to investigate and rectify the issues you mentioned. Once again, we apologize for the inconvenience you faced and appreciate your patience and understanding.

We look forward to welcoming you back and restoring your faith in our hospitality.

Warm Regards,
Grace Margareth

reviews.title: Not Recommended
reviews.text:
I am extremely disappointed with my recent stay at this hotel. The staff behavior was very rude and unprofessional, which made the experience uncomfortable from the beginning. We were asked to wait for a very long time during check-in without any proper explanation or courtesy.

There was no proper room service, and even basic services like towel replacement were not provided regularly. The overall maintenance and service standards were far below expectations.

The hotel and surrounding area were very crowded, which made the stay even more unpleasant. The breakfast was particularly disappointing — the quality, taste, and variety were all very poor.

Overall, it was not a satisfactory experience, and I would not recommend this hotel unless significant improvements are made in staff behavior and service quality.

reviews.title: Staff attitude
reviews.text: I checked in with 2 x 2 groups, arrived at 14:00. Rooms were not ready. 1 group was given a room which was occupied. Was very embarrassing to open the door of another guest. The cleaning came running to assist and open another room while the 2nd room was prepared. The staff also displayed a don’t care attitude. 1 room with single beds was requested during booking, i was not even informed if it was possible. I noticed that another guest was informed to wait while while the room with single beds was prepared.  I also requested the payment to be split as we were 2 groups which wasn’t done, 1 payment was made and not split during check in.  The bathtub/ shower  design was not practical as the shower screen  was too short to prevent the water wetting the floor.  Breakfast was poor.   Nothing to talk about.  Not even butter was available.  The staff at breakfast were friendly.

reviews.title: Terrible Service
reviews.text:
I had booked for the 28th of November and my checkout was on the 29th of November. I arrived at the hotel at 4:30 AM on the 29th, but I got the room at 5:45 AM due to the following reasons:

1- The staff at the reception was completely ignorant. After seeing my hotel voucher, they told me that I had a check-in on the 29th and according to hotel policy, rooms are available at 3 PM. I then showed him the date on the voucher, explaining that this was the checkout date, and the check-in date was the 28th of November. He apologized and said "sorry, sorry."

2- He kept looking for my booking for 30-45 minutes, even though my booking was prepaid, and he couldn't find it. After I raised my voice, he took my credit card and placed an additional hold on the payment before finally allocating the room.

3- I had booked a non-smoking room, and while I was given a non-smoking room, there was a strong smell of smoke in the room.

4- When I went to checkout, I faced the same issue again with the ignorant and lazy reception staff, which wasted another 20-30 minutes of my time during checkout.

In the future, even if this hotel offers me a room for free, I will not stay here again.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Ali, thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered during your stay. We understand how frustrating the check-in process must have been, and we deeply regret that there was a delay in processing your booking and that you experienced confusion regarding your reservation. We will be reviewing this situation with our reception team to ensure a smoother check-in experience for future guests.

We also apologize for the unpleasant smell in your non-smoking room. Cleanliness and guest comfort are top priorities for us, and we will be investigating this matter further to prevent any recurrence.

Regarding your checkout experience, we regret that it caused additional inconvenience. We understand the importance of timely service and are committed to improving our efficiency.

Your feedback is invaluable to us, and we truly appreciate your comments, which will help us enhance our guest experience moving forward. We hope you’ll reconside

reviews.text:
I have booked this hotel through agoda booking site,a smoking room for 3 nights at the arabian courtyard dubai.when I arrived the room was dirty and smelled realy bad.i have asked the receptionist to change my room and she said there are no rooms left other than suit room which she had charged me an extra 450.00 dharhams.i requested to see a manager and was told he was not available.this seemed like a scam to charge me extra.
There was no Internet the room was dirty air-conditioning wasn't working in the suit room.safe was broken.evrytume you report something to the reception they will ignore you for an hour or two,or you happen call and keep reminding them.finaly I met a manager who was attending next room where guest was also complaining his name is maymet I think.he was useless and kept apologising but never got anything sorted.
Hotel from hell never stay again...
Don't book the breakfast less than average there are great restaurants 2 minutes away and it's a lot cheaper.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel, but has some minor issues
reviews.text:
I really like this hotel and the charm that it presents. I can not say enough about the staff from the front desk to house keeping.

But under the surface there are some issues. The noise from the club was just too much for someone that would like to sleep. Constant thump was heard into the morning hours.

I also found unwelcome guests in bathroom, which I found to be rather small. I had to dispense with two cockroaches.

Beyond that the view from the restaurant is very nice with the Museum's Dhow in the foreground.
reviews.positives: Staff is great

reviews.positives: The hotel staff is very friendly and a good place to stay. Receptionist Kamran and others did their job perfectly.

reviews.title: Middle class hotel for tourists
reviews.text:
location good for tourists in old dubai. friendly staff, efficient check-in.picture of hotel on internet not representative of real situation. 
room size ok but interior desperately needs renewing. mattress and pillows not comfortable. room smelled heavily of smoke.
breakfast ok but not enough staff to serve coffee/tea in time.
no free wifi or internet. price too high for 3*- hotel.
do not recommend this hotel for business travel.
reviews.positives: none

reviews.title: Excellent base for tourist visit of Dubai
reviews.positives:
Large comfortable hotel with excellent location in Bur Dubai: at walking distance from the souks, museum (temporarily closed), restaurants and cafés along the creek. The room was spacious and the bathroom recently renovated (new plumbing). A round table and a large desk provided ample space for laptop + your documents or other objects. I appreciated the "multicultural" electric socket mounted right on the side of the desk.

Wifi signal in the room was sufficiently strong and stable during all my stay. Hotel also offers free access to a Business center equipped with 3 PC's (W7) and 1 printer.  An ATM can be found outside the hotel, at about 30 m distance.

The near-self-sufficiency is completed by excellent in-house restaurants: Chinese, Indian, Arabic/Egyptian (temporarily closed), Pub "Sherlock Holmes", and a Cafeteria. Their efficient and friendly personnel make the atmosphere relaxed and happy, prone to protracted lingering, particularly in the Pub (the Indian couple) and in the Cafeteria (Ms. Christine).

I certainly will return to this place at my next visits in Dubai.
reviews.negatives:
Carelessness in listing the hotel features on booking.com :

(1) Upper floors accessible by stairs only ; upper floors accessible by elevator. - This cannot be true simultaneously. My testimony: there ARE elevators.

(2) Having a Business center is an important asset of the hotel. Regrettably, it is not mentioned on booking.com.

moreover the area  is not in new city and except for some cheap buying in the old neighborhood there are no  malls nearby. except for the  arabian decor of rooms and indian breakfast the hotel does not have much to offer. even the fittings  in their executive rooms are dated.

reviews.title: Great location, poor service
reviews.text:
My stay at this hotel was quite disappointing overall. Upon entering the room, I immediately noticed that both the air conditioning and lights were not working, which made the room uncomfortable. There was also an issue with the access card, adding to the inconvenience right from the start.
I contacted reception, but it took nearly an hour—and multiple follow-up calls—before someone from the hotel staff finally came to check the problems. Basic amenities were also missing; there was no shower kit or dental kit provided in the room. Once again, I had to call and request these items, which should have been available by default.
Additionally, one of the hotel lifts was not functioning, causing delays and inconvenience while moving around the property. The swimming pool was also not ready for use, which was disappointing as it is usually an important facility for guests.
On a positive note, the hotel’s location is excellent and very convenient. However, the service quality and overall management need significant improvement. With better attention to maintenance and guest services, this hotel has the potential to offer a much better experience

Le petit déjeuner était vraiment décevant, peu de choix mais surtout pas très goûteux et le personnel tout juste courtois !

reviews.title: Nothing to expect
reviews.text: We came with a receptionist lady who treated us rudely. They don't care about our requests; I mentioned in Agoda asking for both of my kids' birthdays that I needed a room with decorations or a complimentary cake, but she just replied, "I don't know, let me see," and then forgot it. We stayed here for 2 days and regret staying for 2 days despite the nice location for traveling around. But I can't call it a staycation because it's an old hotel. Vintage but not maintained. The AC is not working properly, and the phone in the room is also not working. I faced breakfast on the first day, but thanks to Daniel in the restaurant service, he made our experience better in this regard. The price of the room including breakfast is not worth it; the breakfast is limited with not many options. They served only Indian food along with English breakfast, which is okay for us. The water was yellow on the first day we opened it, the bathtub worked well, and there was no vanity kit or dental kit unless you requested it. I took 2 rooms for 2 nights including breakfast, but so far it has not been a good experience to stay in Dubai with this hotel. Thanks to the cleaning lady who gave us an iron board, thanks to Daniel for serving us the best, and thanks to the room service team who tried their best to clean our room. Overall, my bad experience started with the reception lady who misled me regarding the check-in, the tourism fees, and the breakfast process.

reviews.title: Bad room service and terrible food
reviews.text: Food quality was really bad and oily. and hardly any change is everyday menu. North indian and south india food quality was bad. really disappointed.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Neha, Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We sincerely apologize that the food did not meet your expectations during your stay. We understand how important dining experiences are, and we are truly sorry to hear that the quality and variety of the dishes, especially the North and South Indian options, were not to your satisfaction.

Please be assured that your comments have been forwarded to our culinary team for review, and we will make every effort to improve the quality and diversity of our offerings. We greatly value your input, as it helps us continually enhance our services.

We hope you will consider giving us another opportunity to serve you better in the future.

reviews.title: Seen better days
reviews.text: It’s a hotel that is a weird combination of bygone era luxury touches and a decrepitude that talks to a lack of maintenance and refurbishment. I loved the style of the hotel and the friendliness of the staff andamazed by its number of restaurants and bars. It’s right across from the museum...also rather strange and a hop and skip to the creek and souk .

reviews.title: Hotel ist nur wegen seiner Lage im Zentrum der Altstadt von Dubai eingeschränkt geeignet.
reviews.negatives:
Frühstücksbuffet war auf mehrheitlich indische Hotelgäste zugeschnitten.
Beim Einchecken wurde die Sicherheit für Minibar, etc. in Höhe von 300 Dirham auf der Kreditkarte nicht nur geblockt, sondern abgebucht. Damit entstehen zusätzliche Umtausch- und Kreditkartengebühren bei Abbuchung und späterer Rückbuchung zu Lasten des Kunden.
Auscheckvorgang dauerte mindestens 15 Minuten.

reviews.title: Cleanliness
reviews.text: Staff very friendly and always ready to assist

reviews.title: Nur noch ein Schattendasein
reviews.positives: Das Hotel liegt im Herzen der Altstadt, direkt neben dem Dubai Museum. In wenigen Minuten erreicht man zu Fuß den Dubai Creek und den Souk. Dazu kommt eine orientalisch angehauchte Ausstattung. Es gibt mehrere Restaurants, einen Pub und einen Nachtclub.
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel lebt von seiner Vergangenheit, ist inzwischen aber ganz schön heruntergekommen. In der 7. Etage funktionierte das WLAN nicht mehr, im Bad kam das Wasser zwar auch aus dem Duschkopf, spritzte aber auch aus allen undichten Verschraubungen. Ein Aufzug war komplett außer Betrieb, beim anderen zeigte die Steuerung Fehler.
Das Frühstück ist auf indische Gäste zugeschnitten und, ehrlich gesagt, das Gegenteil von lecker.

reviews.text:
They forgot our booked airport to hotel pickup ,had to ring them twice before they turned up,but still charged us for it.

reviews.title: Hotel - in zentraler Lagen - nur zu empfehlen

reviews.negatives: Alles bestens!

reviews.title: Overall ok, but hotel was priced way too expensive
reviews.text: The first night I was given a smoking room, though I thought I had booked a non-smoking room, on the back of the hotel. I asked for it to avoid street noise. I was given a room on the 2nd floor.  The widow view wwas half blocked by the domed roof of the building adjacent to the room.  I couldn't sleep, the stench of smoke was very strong and at around 6 o' clock the call for prayer started from a mosque nearby. So loud that it seemed to be in my room! The next day, I was given a non-smoking room on the 5t floor, which was ok. The mosque was still there though ... The hotel looks old, with old and used furniture an fixtures, room doors let noise through, you can hear people going by at all hours of day an night, and house keeping staff collecting stuff from storage places in hallways early in the morning. A/C a bit noisy and producing a low-frequency humming sound. Bed was comfortable.
reviews.positives: Friendly and professional staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Lage für uns perfekt in der altstadt von dubai, fussläufig zum creek  und metro.nette und gpnstige rrstaurants.zimmer gross und geräumig.personal sehr nett
reviews.negatives: Im gym waren die meisten geräte defekt

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Not to close to the Metro. The hotel itself is ok but there isnt much to do in that area. We had troubles with our fridge what took 2 go's to fix. The rooms are a good size.
reviews.positives: The bar was ok, breakfast was good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: ausgezeichnete Lage in der Altstadt, viele Sehenswürdigkeiten innerhalb kurzer Zeit erreichbar, schöne Zimmer im arabischen Stil mit tollem Ausblick, sehr freundliches Personal

reviews.title: Good experience, indian rather than arabian
reviews.text: It was good, very nice staff, very helpful. But the theme as Indian rather than Arabian.
reviews.positives: Near the market, I bought a cheap PS4 - near the museum

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Das Arabian Courtyard ist unser Lieblingshotel in Dubai, traditionell und authentisch im alten Teil von Dubai.
Zentrale Lage, dennoch ruhig.
Sehr sauber, schönes arabisches Interieur, renoviert und neu, keine in die Jahre gekommenen Möbel und Teppiche.
Personal überall SEHR freundlich, Rezeption, Bellboy, Roomservice, Restaurants. 
Fitnessraum auch zweckmäßig ausgestattet und schön leer.
Am besten gefällt uns das sehr große indische Restaurant im Haus. Fantastisches Essen, Live Entertainment ( indische Band mit Tänzerinnen), Topservice und Alkohol gibt es auch.
Außerdem eine Bar 1. Stock, man kann draußen sitzen.
reviews.negatives:
Der Poolbereich ist nicht so ansprechend,  neue Auflagen auf den Liegestühlen wären angebracht und mehr Sonnenschutz.
Aber das war uns nicht so wichtig.

reviews.title: great location hotel

reviews.positives: location, good handling of lugage and good performance of staff

reviews.title: Staff is Friendly
reviews.text: Staff is helpful to solve problem.  Hotel location is near local restaurants.  Room is spacious but the equipment turns old.  Addtional bed should be well prepared before customer check-in.  I'll stay in this hotel again when I visit Dubai in the future.
reviews.positives: Staff is friendly, Room is spacious, Near local restaurants

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wir hatten ein super Zimmer im 7. Stock mit einem Traumblick auf den Greek. Wir hatten ein seperaten Frühstücksraum auf der Etage.

reviews.title: A decent hotel for the price and location.
reviews.text: Overall this hotel experience was Okay because there were both a fair share of pros and cons, and I guess it all depends on what's important to each individual.  The pub is the most fun - great drink variety and nightly specials, good live music, a very decent crowd. The room is fair - fairly spacious and traditional design is rather appealing and quaint, the bed made some noises but it was tolerable, and there were little fruit flies in the bathroom at all times for some reason so I felt there was some cleanliness issue although it wasn't dirty.  I was disappointed in management's responsiveness to any concerns raised, however.  I was really disappointed when the staff angrily called my room accusing me of smuggling someone in when I had paid for two guests all along - they were entirely unapologetic for that, meanwhile my guest felt insulted.  I called to ask if I could use the microwave and was told yes after some explanation (am on a special diet due to medical reasons), however when I went down the manager was annoyed - internal training/communication clearly needs to improve.  When first checking-in, I stepped on some pieces of glass and metal on the floor - not too happy about that as my feet were already aching from a long 25 hour journey from point A (NYC) to point B (Dubai) - but was upgraded so that was appreciated.  The upgraded room was slightly bigger and the only other difference I noticed was the dining chairs were nicer, with cushions, but it was a nice gesture nonetheless.  I'd say this was a disappointing stay at an otherwise fairly nice hotel.  Although I'd rate this stay a 6 I have stayed here in the past and would rate it perhaps 7.5.  There are just a handful of staff members that bend over backwards for the guest so those are the ones I went back for, despite some issues. If you get a good price give this place a whirl, as there are some perks and the neighborhood itself is well worth it.  Area Tips: Definitely try the Parathas place right do
reviews.positives: The pub at this place is a lot of fun with a great variety of drinks and specials.  The rooms were relatively spacious, at least medium sized.  And the location of hotel is quite convenient.

reviews.title: Nella città vecchia

reviews.negatives: La stanza era molto sporca con odore di muffa, abbiamo chiesto di cambiarla e ci hanno dato una seconda sistemazione
